absorption: ASK absorption aktif: Session-wide massive CVD negatif (-2739788) fiyat VAL altinda tutunup mini pozitif delta (delta_sum_5bars +20) ile fiyat ilerleyemiyorsa = kurumsal satis baskisi altinda gizli SHORT setup
dom_observation: DOM ratio 1.19 (bid agir gorunurken) session buy_sell_ratio 0.58 (satis 42% daha yuksek) = derin satis baskisi; ask_vol/bid_vol 5/2 mevcut barda satis dominansi
htf_alignment: 5m BEAR + 15m/1h/4h BULL = mixte signal ancak 5m immediate trend BEARISH, short-term satis baskisina uyan
session_bias: Buy/Sell ratio 0.58 + session delta -2739788 = gun boyunca agir satis; fiyat VAL (64552) altinda + CVD divergence = kurumsal para satista
reasoning: CVD divergence + possible_absorption + session satis dominansi (0.58 ratio) + 5m BEAR + VAL alti acceptance = erken SHORT setup; pozitif delta rebound sonarasinda negatife donus expected
